description.to:
## Problem
Production score-processing Lambda fails during initialization with UnauthorizedException from GraphQL account lookup (Account.get_by_key).

## Evidence
Lambda stack trace shows failure path in plexus/dashboard/api/client.py during client.execute called by plexus/dashboard/api/models/account.py:get_by_key.

## Expected
Lambda should authenticate correctly against AppSync and resolve account by key in production.
